message:
test(fnp-python): pin frompyfunc.reduce negative-axis parity

Extends frompyfunc live-NumPy parity coverage with negative-axis reduce
cases: axis=-1, axis=-2, single-element tuples (-1,) and (-2,), plus
axis=-1 with keepdims=True. Each case is compared against
np.frompyfunc(...).reduce(...) via reduce_outcome so both value and
error paths are oracle-pinned.

Closes franken_numpy-78j1 (Python-callable / object-dtype core plus
reduce with axis/keepdims/out/where/initial were already delivered in
earlier commits — this locks negative-axis semantics against silent
regression; advanced methods .accumulate/.outer/.reduceat belong to
separate beads).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
